reference: Hello, my wife and son have had a low-grade fever for more than a month. Several tests have been conducted, including blood tests for typhoid and malaria, etc. Recently, an ultrasound was conducted for my wife, where two results were found: one was kidney stones, and there was a small increase in liver size. However, my son does not have any symptoms of fever and is having a temperature below one hundred degrees Fahrenheit. My wife is experiencing a temperature below one hundred and one degrees Fahrenheit. Please suggest what to do.
text: Hello, my wife and son have had a low-grade fever for more than a month. Several tests have been conducted, including blood tests for typhoid and malaria, etc. Recently, an ultrasound was conducted for my wife, where two results were found: one was kidney stones, and there was a small increase in liver size. However, my son does not have any symptoms of fever and is having a temperature below one hundred degrees Fahrenheit. My wife is experiencing a temperature below one hundred and one degrees Fahrenheit. Please suggest what to do.
